evals.expected_output: 4-phase evaluation with PASS/WARNING/FAIL judgments, problem summary by severity, and prioritized action list
expectations: All 4 phases (preparation, implementation, verification, pre-release) are evaluated
Each checklist item has a PASS/WARNING/FAIL judgment
Summary includes problem counts by severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low)
Priority action list with concrete improvement suggestions is provided

evals.expected_output: Similar skill names suggested and user prompted to confirm
expectations: Glob search is performed in .claude/skills/ for similar names
Candidate skill names are presented to the user
AskUserQuestion is used to confirm the correct target

evals.expected_output: User is asked to specify which skill to review
expectations: AskUserQuestion tool is invoked to ask for the target skill name
No evaluation is started without a target

evals.prompt: このスキルの改善点を教えて
evals.expected_output: Skill reviewer triggers and asks which skill to review, or reviews the contextually relevant skill
expectations: skill-reviewer skill is triggered (not skill-creator or pr-reviewer)
Review process begins or user is asked to specify target
